untranslatable_reason: Signal requires proportional position sizing based on deviation magnitude and mean-reversion half-life analysis (< 10 years), which are portfolio-level risk management features not expressible in entry/exit conditions. Specific lookback_period, threshold, backtest_sharpe, and backtest_period marked as AUTHOR_SILENT. Seasonal regime conditions (specific periods of day/specific conditions) cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Used bb_pct_b (Bollinger Band %B) to detect deviation from mean: values < 0.2 indicate price near lower band (oversold/mean reversion opportunity), values > 0.8 indicate price near upper band. Exit when price returns to middle band (bb_pct_b ≈ 0.5). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Target regime RANGING as stationary/mean-reverting conditions are typical of range-bound markets. Position scaling logic and half-life filtering must be implemented at portfolio level.
